Bash(/dev/null -e "SELECT spi.id, spi.culture, spi.title, LEFT\(spi.content, 80\) as preview FROM static_page_i18n spi WHERE spi.content IS NOT NULL AND spi.content != '''' AND LENGTH\(spi.content\) > 50 ORDER BY spi.title")
Bash(/dev/null -e "SELECT spi.id, spi.culture, spi.title, LENGTH\(spi.content\) as len FROM static_page_i18n spi WHERE spi.content IS NOT NULL AND spi.content != '''' ORDER BY len DESC")

Bash(FAMILYSEARCH_CLIENT_ID=48564 FAMILYSEARCH_USERNAME=pieterse.johan3@gmail.com FAMILYSEARCH_PASSWORD='Merlot@123' python3 -c "
import requests, os
resp = requests.post\('https://ident.familysearch.org/cis-web/oauth2/v3/token', data={
    'grant_type': 'password',
    'client_id': os.environ['FAMILYSEARCH_CLIENT_ID'],
    'username': os.environ['FAMILYSEARCH_USERNAME'],
    'password': os.environ['FAMILYSEARCH_PASSWORD'],
}\)
print\('Status:', resp.status_code\)
print\('Body:', resp.text[:500]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(sudo -u www-data python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/opt/ahg-ai/htr'\)
from spellcheck import SpellChecker
sc = SpellChecker\(\)
ok = sc.add_word\('Beaufortwest'\)
print\('Added:', ok\)
print\('Check:', sc.check\('Beaufortwest'\)\)
print\('Custom:', sc.get_custom_words\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
